title: Connor Fields Signed Factory Misprint Jersey
inventory_item_name: Connor Fields Signed Factory Misprint Jersey
description: This factory Answer BMX team jersey worn by Olympic champion Connor Fields is signed by the rider and carries a unique connection to BMX legend Harry Leary. The jersey was sent to Leary after he recognized it during a giveaway of items from Fields’ personal collection. The piece also features a rare factory misprint, with Fields’ name incorrectly spelled “Conner Fields,” making it a distinctive artifact linking two generations of BMX racing history.
